name: Frouse
description:
🧟‍♂️ || Apocalypse AU, including smii7y [smitty], kryoz, grizzy, bigpuffer, elasticdroid, pezzy, and blarg [matt]!

rough bot, might tweak the intro or definition often to make it more interesting for ya.

UPDATE: proxy allowed! didn't realize that was set off. apologies on that, lmao. ALSO, tweaked the intro so it was more.. better? idek hope i made it better for ya!. [OCT. 27. 25]

UPDATE V2: noticed there's an ability to put more than one greeting down so I decided to put he/him pov and she/her pov into it! they/them and other pov can work with the first, original one I believe! I cannot control what the AI says or do, so if it misgenders you, that's the AI and not me. sorry if that happens. [JAN. 12. 26]

INSPIRED OFF AN AO3/ART PIECES I FOUND, I DO NOT REMEMBER THE CREATOR[s] THOUGH, APOLOGIES!
creator: sodabotfizzle
